signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | MED confidence[3]
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | MED confidence[3]

Goldman Sachs' U.S. Inflation Monitor (released April 20) highlights headline CPI at 3.29% YoY in March due to Iran war-driven energy spike (oil from $71 to $103/barrel), but core PCE decelerating toward 2.2% (ex-tariffs), with forecasts for core goods easing to 0.6% by Dec 2026 and Brent crude falling to $80/barrel Q4[1]. signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Lists XRP in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Lists XRP in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**

Rakuten Wallet, serving 44 million users in Japan, listed XRP in mid-April, adding major retail distribution in Asia.[1]

signals.headline: XRP Ledger Integrates Boundless Privacy Technology | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Ledger Integrates Boundless Privacy Technology | YES | HIGH confidence**

The XRP Ledger integrated Boundless on April 14, bringing zero-knowledge proof technology for institutional confidential transactions.[1]

signals.headline: CLARITY Act SEC Roundtable Avoids Negative XRP Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act SEC Roundtable Avoids Negative XRP Signals | YES | HIGH confidence**

The CLARITY Act roundtable held at the SEC on April 16 contained no negative signals toward XRP's commodity classification, maintaining institutional confidence in regulatory trajectory.[1]

signals.headline: XRP Outperforms Bitcoin and Ethereum Weekly | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Outperforms Bitcoin and Ethereum Weekly | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP gained 6.7% over seven days to $1.43, outperforming Bitcoin (7%) and Ethereum (9%), with 24-hour trading volume jumping 23% to $3.79 billion.[1]

signals.headline: US XRP ETFs Record Strongest Inflow Day Since February | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US XRP ETFs Record Strongest Inflow Day Since February | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP ETF inflows hit $17.11 million on April 15 alone, with four consecutive inflow days totaling $38.86 million, lifting total ETF assets under management above $1.25 billion.[1]

signals.headline: Ethereum Shows Early Recovery Signs | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Shows Early Recovery Signs | YES | HIGH confidence**

Ethereum is trading at $2,184 with bullish technical patterns forming after two weeks of decline, with RSI near oversold levels and major moving averages converging.[2]
